subcodes.first_line: O ye servants of the Beloved One! The morn hath dawned and the effulgent rays of grace [3.5s]

subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @differences in human capacity, @the divine emanation; the all-pervading bounty of God, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision
